description: User examines the departing fare types (Red Edeal vs Economy Flex) in the selection modal.
User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Red Edeal' fare.
A loading overlay appears with the message 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...'.
frame_description: Loading overlay visible over the search results.

description: The page transitions to the return flight selection screen.
User scrolls down the page to view more return flight options.
